infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CERP needs location to show your position on the area map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: CERP needs location to alert you when an incident is nearby.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CERP needs camera access to scan QR codes.
